name: Adolf Wuerth GmbH & Co. KG
h1: Wurth, Würth's GCC footprint in India
lede: Wurth, Würth runs five capability centers across four Indian cities. Pune, Bengaluru, Kolkata and New Delhi, covering distribution, it, manufacturing and sales & marketing, built over eleven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Wurth, Würth office in India. We map five, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Wurth, Würth GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Wurth, Würth runs 5 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru, Kolkata, New Delhi), covering distribution, it, manufacturing and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Wurth, Würth's India footprint covers Pune, Bengaluru, Kolkata and New Delhi, spanning distribution, it, manufacturing and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twelve decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Wurth, Würth operate in India?
faq.a: Wurth, Würth operates 5 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Wurth, Würth have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Wurth, Würth's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Bengaluru, Kolkata and New Delhi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Wurth, Würth run in India?
faq.a: Wurth, Würth runs distribution, it, manufacturing and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Wurth, Würth's India GCCs?
faq.a: Wurth, Würth's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Wurth, Würth's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Wurth, Würth's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
